item.title: Wolverine PS5 Game Will Let You Censor It
item.description:
Marvel's Wolverine developer Insomniac Games stated that the upcoming PS5 title will include an option for players to turn off the game's blood and gore. The news came after Marvel's Wolverine was the first game shown off during the hour-long State of Play broadcast on June 2.

Players Can Make Marvel's Wolverine Less Gory

Though Marvel's Wolverine will include brutal combat sequences inspired by the God of War series, some players may be put off by the game's violent content. In an IGN interview, Wolverine game director Mike Daly stated that the upcoming PS5 exclusive will have an accessibility option to censor the game's blood and gore. Daly stated that the development team knows that the violent content of Marvel's Wolverine is not for everyone. Part of the game's combat will involve Wolverine issuing lethal takedowns with his adamantium claws, which can carve through anyone or anything. Ergo, Insomniac will include an option that will make Marvel's Wolverine more tolerable for players who may be squeamish at the sight of blood and gore.

Marvel's Wolverine

Follow
Followed
Action
Adventure
Systems
OpenCritic Reviews
Released
September 15, 2026
ESRB
Mature 17+ / Blood and Gore, Drug Reference, Intense Violence, Partial Nudity, Strong Language, In-Game Purchases
Developer(s)
Insomniac Games
Publisher(s)
Sony Interactive Entertainment
6 Images

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Genre(s)
Action, Adventure
Powered by
item.content:encoded:
Marvel's Wolverine developer Insomniac Games stated that the upcoming PS5 title will include an option for players to turn off the game's blood and gore. The news came after Marvel's Wolverine was the first game shown off during the hour-long State of Play broadcast on June 2.

Players Can Make Marvel's Wolverine Less Gory

Though Marvel's Wolverine will include brutal combat sequences inspired by the God of War series, some players may be put off by the game's violent content. In an IGN interview, Wolverine game director Mike Daly stated that the upcoming PS5 exclusive will have an accessibility option to censor the game's blood and gore. Daly stated that the development team knows that the violent content of Marvel's Wolverine is not for everyone. Part of the game's combat will involve Wolverine issuing lethal takedowns with his adamantium claws, which can carve through anyone or anything. Ergo, Insomniac will include an option that will make Marvel's Wolverine more tolerable for players who may be squeamish at the sight of blood and gore.

Marvel's Wolverine

September 15, 2026

Mature 17+ / Blood and Gore, Drug Reference, Intense Violence, Partial Nudity, Strong Language, In-Game Purchases

Insomniac Games
Publisher(s)
Sony Interactive Entertainment

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Genre(s)
Action, Adventure
Powered by

item.title: Crime Scene Cleaner Achievement Guide
item.description:
Crime Scene Cleaner, the dark and gritty cleaning simulator, has a lot of achievements that you can collect. While many of them are tied to the missions and getting perfect scores, some can be pretty tricky to get. Thankfully, none of these achievements are missable, and you can always replay the missions to unlock anything you’ve missed the first time around. Still, figuring out the exact location and what you’ll have to do for each achievement in Crime Scene Cleaner can be tough. We’ve pieced together this handy guide to make things easier.

Updated on June 2, 2026, by Nahda Nabiilah: Thanks to the release of Act 2 as well as the Communiti levels, players can unlock more achievements after completing the requirements. You can now clean more scenes and discover a lot of secrets while collecting CDs to finish the mission with a perfect score.

How To Unlock Every Achievement In Crime Scene Cleaner

Achievements

Requirement

How To Unlock

This is How We Do It

Wash off your first blood stain

After starting the game, use your mop or sponge to wash off a bloodstain.

Dirty Deeds Done Dirt Cheap

Complete the Bad Call mission

–

Who Let the Dogs Out

Pet Dexter

Dexter is your dog, who you'll find in your apartment. Pet him for the first time, and the achievement will be unlocked.

Supermassive Black Hole

Pick up 100 pieces of trash

–

Relax, Take it Easy

Complete the Trial By Blood mission

–

Bitter Sweet Symphony

Play music cassette for the first time

Open your skill tree by pressing the C button then click on the Music tab to choose a song to play.

Can You Feel My Heart

Complete the Toxic Love Mission

–

Bad Call

Complete Bad Call mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Bad Call mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Pictures Of You

Complete nightmare version of the Bad Call mission

–

Hail to the King

Watch the video with Czarek the cat

Unlocked during the mission Short Circuit. You need to access the Living Room and go to the room with the large TV. Look at the video playing on the TV to unlock the achievement.

Gold on the Ceiling

Find and use the V.I.P card

Unlocked during the Trial by Blood mission. You'll need to pick up all the Locker Key cards spread around the map. The V.I.P. card will be in one of these lockers. You'll then need to use the V.I.P. card in the V.I.P. terminal located in the hidden Water Control room to unlock this achievement.

Toxic Love

Complete Toxic Love mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Toxic Love mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

I Will Survive

Complete the nightmare version of the Toxic Love mission

–

Trial by Blood

Complete Trial by Blood mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Trial by Blood mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Welcome To The Jungle

Complete the nightmare version of the Trial By Blood mission

–

Technical Difficulties

Complete the Short Circuit mission.

–

Bóbr k*rw@!

F***! What a beast!

Break two wooden planks with one punch. Easiest to do in the Bad Call mission.

Gangsta's Paradise

Complete the Italian Job mission

–

Oops!...I Did it Again

Tip the bucket over 15 times

You need to tip over your wash bucket 15 times after filling it with water. Do it in a washroom with a clean bucket to save you the hassle of cleaning up later on.

Get Lucky

Find and open the hidden safe

Open the secret safe behind the large painting in the hidden room with the dead body in the mission Toxic Love.

What I've Done

Destroy 30 objects

Destroy 30 wooden planks, glasses, vases, or bottles to get this achievement.

Bad Romance

Complete the Affair with Death mission.

–

Short Circuit

Complete the Short Circuit mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Short Circuit mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Rocket Man

Complete the nightmare version of the Short Circuit mission

–

Money for Nothing

Get rid of worthless paper from the basement

Collect the stacks of money in the Basement area during the mission Affair with Death. You’ll find a small opening in the basement where you can go through to find the money.

Treasure

Get to the gambling room and open the safe

During the Italian Job mission, go to the Gambling Room hidden under the trapdoor in the Manager's Room and open the wall safe. You'll need the Unknown Key from the kitchen to access the room.

Another One Bites the Dust

Complete the Friendly Fire Mission

–

Pyramid Song

Destroy the toilet paper pyramid

During the Friendly Fire mission, you'll see a toilet paper pyramid on the washroom shelf. Knock it over to get this achievement.

Affair with Death

Complete Affair with Death mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Affair with Death mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

I Want To Break Free

Complete the nightmare version of the Affair With Death mission

–

Friendly Fire

Complete Friendly Fire mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Friendly Fire mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Eye Of The Tiger

Complete the nightmare version of the Friendly Fire mission

–

Smells Like Teen Spirit

Complete the Party's Over mission

–

Italian Job

Complete Italian Job mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Italian Job mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Robot Rock

Complete the nightmare version of the Italian Job mission

–

Strawberry Fields Forever

Steal miraculous fertilizer

Pick up the fertilizer in the secret Garden area beside the cassette tape in the Bad Call mission. You'll need to go to the Hidden Apartment by the first staircase and exit the window to get to this spot.

Basket Case

Throw the ball into the basket

You'll find a basketball court near the pool in the mission Affair with Death. Throw a ball in the hoop to get this achievement.

Party's Over

Complete Party's Over mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Party's Over mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Like A Ritual

Complete the nightmare version of the Party's Over mission

–

The Art of Dying

Complete the Modern Art mission

–

Money, Money, Money

Steal $50,000

–

Modern Art

Complete the Modern Art mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Modern Art mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Bad To The Bone

Complete the nightmare version of the Modern Art mission

–

Killing in the Name

Complete the Call in Dead mission

–

Single Ladies

Witness the tragic love story

Find the secret bench in the garden during the mission Party's Over. Look for a hidden path on the outside wall and follow it all the way to the end to find it.

Fight for Your Right (to party)

Pop 30 balloons

During the Party's Over Mission, pop the balloons by punching them or running over them.

Rage against the Machine

Liberate the sacred blade from its eternal slumber

In the mission Modern Art, find the North Exhibit maze with the TVs in one corner. Match the color of the TV with the reflection shown in the glass ceiling to unlock a hidden door. Go inside and pick up the Katana to get this achievement.

Happy Together

Pet Dexter 15 times

–

Rock and Roll All Nite

Visit the Rowbau concert venue

Visit the secret rock concert location over the wall in the Back Alley during the mission Italian Job

Call in Dead

Complete Call in Dead mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Call in Dead mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Heavy Metal

Complete the nightmare version of the Call in Dead mission

–

While My Guitar Gently Weeps

Play some guitars

You'll find some guitars in different missions in Crime Scene Cleaner . Interact with one of them to unlock this achievement.

Another Brick in the Wall

Touch the lamp and see what happens

Interact with the crooked Wall Sconce in the hallway during the mission Short Circuit.

Smooth Operator

Complete a mission without breaking any items or creating any new stains

Self-explanatory. Use the sponge when there are breakable objects nearby to clean without breaking items.

Perfect Crime

Complete all missions with a 100% deception score

Complete all missions in Crime Scene Cleaner with a perfect score.

Harder Better Faster Stronger

Unlock all skills in Cleaning skill tree

–

Take On Me

Unlock all skills in General Skill tree

–

Toxic Garbage Island

Unlock all skills in Tools skill tree

–

Wash It All Away

Unlock all skills in Pressure Washer skill tree

–

Rain Formerly Known As Purple

Unlock all skills in Water skill tree

–

Things Left Behind

Complete Things Left Behind mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Things Left Behind mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Routines In The Night

Complete Things Left Behind mission

–

Everybody Wants To Rule The World

Complete the Amber Alert mission

–

Amber Alert

Complete Amber Alert mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Amber Alert mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Machine Love

Complete the Secluded Retreat mission

–

Secluded Retreat

Complete Secluded Retreat mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Secluded Retreat mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Losing My Religion

Complete the Circle of Friends mission

–

Circle Of Friends

Complete Circle of Friends mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Circle of Friends mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Demon Cleaner

Complete the Town Too Small mission

–

Town Too Small

Complete Town Too Small mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Town Too Small mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Sweet Dreams

Complete all nightmares missions

–

Hold On To The Vision

Complete your first True Cleaner Challenge

–

Lookin' Out My Back Door

Find Zack's secret room

Find the secret hidden room during the mission Call in Dead. From the control room, use the step stool to jump onto the lockers and reach the pipes. Follow the pipes to get to a vent, break it open, and drop to the hidden room.

Electric Feel

Throw the toaster into the bathtub

In your apartment, pick up the toaster from the kitchen and throw it in the bathtub.

Juke Box Hero

Find all music cassettes

–

All Night Radio

Find all music discs

–

We Are the Sound

Collect all CD-DVDs

–

Sharp Dressed Man

Equip a skin for every one of your tools

–

Call Me Maybe

Don't respond to Big Jim's call

Don't answer the walkie-talkie at the start of the mission Trial by Blood.

Down by the River

Remember to flush!

Flush the toilet once each mission.

The Communiti levels don't have any achievements, so these are all the achievements that are available in Crime Scene Cleaner . Hopefully, this guide will make it easier for you to track everything down.

Crime Scene Cleaner

Follow
Followed
Simulation
Crime
Systems
OpenCritic Reviews
Critics Rec: 29%
Released
August 14, 2024
ESRB
Mature 17+ / Blood and Gore, Drug Reference, Strong Language, Violence
Developer(s)
President Studio
Publisher(s)
President Studio, PlayWay S.A.
10 Images

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL

Engine
Unity
Steam Deck Compatibility
Playable
Platform(s)
PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X, Xbox Series S, PC, Android, iOS
Genre(s)
Simulation, Crime
How Long To Beat
12 hours
How Long To Beat (Completionist Runs)
13.5 hours
Powered by
item.content:encoded:
Crime Scene Cleaner, the dark and gritty cleaning simulator, has a lot of achievements that you can collect. While many of them are tied to the missions and getting perfect scores, some can be pretty tricky to get. Thankfully, none of these achievements are missable, and you can always replay the missions to unlock anything you’ve missed the first time around. Still, figuring out the exact location and what you’ll have to do for each achievement in Crime Scene Cleaner can be tough. We’ve pieced together this handy guide to make things easier.

Updated on June 2, 2026, by Nahda Nabiilah: Thanks to the release of Act 2 as well as the Communiti levels, players can unlock more achievements after completing the requirements. You can now clean more scenes and discover a lot of secrets while collecting CDs to finish the mission with a perfect score.

How To Unlock Every Achievement In Crime Scene Cleaner

Achievements

Requirement

How To Unlock

This is How We Do It

Wash off your first blood stain

After starting the game, use your mop or sponge to wash off a bloodstain.

Dirty Deeds Done Dirt Cheap

Complete the Bad Call mission

–

Who Let the Dogs Out

Pet Dexter

Dexter is your dog, who you'll find in your apartment. Pet him for the first time, and the achievement will be unlocked.

Supermassive Black Hole

Pick up 100 pieces of trash

–

Relax, Take it Easy

Complete the Trial By Blood mission

–

Bitter Sweet Symphony

Play music cassette for the first time

Open your skill tree by pressing the C button then click on the Music tab to choose a song to play.

Can You Feel My Heart

Complete the Toxic Love Mission

–

Complete Bad Call mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Bad Call mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Complete nightmare version of the Bad Call mission

–

Watch the video with Czarek the cat

Unlocked during the mission Short Circuit. You need to access the Living Room and go to the room with the large TV. Look at the video playing on the TV to unlock the achievement.

Unlocked during the Trial by Blood mission. You'll need to pick up all the Locker Key cards spread around the map. The V.I.P. card will be in one of these lockers. You'll then need to use the V.I.P. card in the V.I.P. terminal located in the hidden Water Control room to unlock this achievement.

Complete Toxic Love mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Toxic Love mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

I Will Survive

Complete the nightmare version of the Toxic Love mission

–

Trial by Blood

Complete Trial by Blood mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Trial by Blood mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Complete the nightmare version of the Trial By Blood mission

–

Technical Difficulties

Complete the Short Circuit mission.

–

Bóbr k*rw@!

F***! What a beast!

Break two wooden planks with one punch. Easiest to do in the Bad Call mission.

Gangsta's Paradise

Complete the Italian Job mission

–

Oops!...I Did it Again

Tip the bucket over 15 times

You need to tip over your wash bucket 15 times after filling it with water. Do it in a washroom with a clean bucket to save you the hassle of cleaning up later on.

Get Lucky

Find and open the hidden safe

Open the secret safe behind the large painting in the hidden room with the dead body in the mission Toxic Love.

What I've Done

Destroy 30 objects

Destroy 30 wooden planks, glasses, vases, or bottles to get this achievement.

Bad Romance

Complete the Affair with Death mission.

–

Short Circuit

Complete the Short Circuit mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Short Circuit mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Rocket Man

Complete the nightmare version of the Short Circuit mission

–

Money for Nothing

Get rid of worthless paper from the basement

Collect the stacks of money in the Basement area during the mission Affair with Death. You’ll find a small opening in the basement where you can go through to find the money.

Treasure

Get to the gambling room and open the safe

During the Italian Job mission, go to the Gambling Room hidden under the trapdoor in the Manager's Room and open the wall safe. You'll need the Unknown Key from the kitchen to access the room.

Another One Bites the Dust

Complete the Friendly Fire Mission

–

Pyramid Song

Destroy the toilet paper pyramid

During the Friendly Fire mission, you'll see a toilet paper pyramid on the washroom shelf. Knock it over to get this achievement.

Affair with Death

Complete Affair with Death mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Affair with Death mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

I Want To Break Free

Complete the nightmare version of the Affair With Death mission

–

Friendly Fire

Complete Friendly Fire mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Friendly Fire mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Eye Of The Tiger

Complete the nightmare version of the Friendly Fire mission

–

Smells Like Teen Spirit

Complete the Party's Over mission

–

Italian Job

Complete Italian Job mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Italian Job mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Robot Rock

Complete the nightmare version of the Italian Job mission

–

Strawberry Fields Forever

Steal miraculous fertilizer

Pick up the fertilizer in the secret Garden area beside the cassette tape in the Bad Call mission. You'll need to go to the Hidden Apartment by the first staircase and exit the window to get to this spot.

Basket Case

Throw the ball into the basket

You'll find a basketball court near the pool in the mission Affair with Death. Throw a ball in the hoop to get this achievement.

Party's Over

Complete Party's Over mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Party's Over mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Like A Ritual

Complete the nightmare version of the Party's Over mission

–

The Art of Dying

Complete the Modern Art mission

–

Money, Money, Money

Steal $50,000

–

Modern Art

Complete the Modern Art mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Modern Art mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Bad To The Bone

Complete the nightmare version of the Modern Art mission

–

Killing in the Name

Complete the Call in Dead mission

–

Single Ladies

Witness the tragic love story

Find the secret bench in the garden during the mission Party's Over. Look for a hidden path on the outside wall and follow it all the way to the end to find it.

Fight for Your Right (to party)

Pop 30 balloons

During the Party's Over Mission, pop the balloons by punching them or running over them.

Liberate the sacred blade from its eternal slumber

In the mission Modern Art, find the North Exhibit maze with the TVs in one corner. Match the color of the TV with the reflection shown in the glass ceiling to unlock a hidden door. Go inside and pick up the Katana to get this achievement.

Happy Together

Pet Dexter 15 times

–

Rock and Roll All Nite

Visit the Rowbau concert venue

Visit the secret rock concert location over the wall in the Back Alley during the mission Italian Job

Call in Dead

Complete Call in Dead mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Call in Dead mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Heavy Metal

Complete the nightmare version of the Call in Dead mission

–

While My Guitar Gently Weeps

Play some guitars

You'll find some guitars in different missions in Crime Scene Cleaner . Interact with one of them to unlock this achievement.

Another Brick in the Wall

Touch the lamp and see what happens

Interact with the crooked Wall Sconce in the hallway during the mission Short Circuit.

Smooth Operator

Complete a mission without breaking any items or creating any new stains

Self-explanatory. Use the sponge when there are breakable objects nearby to clean without breaking items.

Perfect Crime

Complete all missions with a 100% deception score

Complete all missions in Crime Scene Cleaner with a perfect score.

Harder Better Faster Stronger

Unlock all skills in Cleaning skill tree

–

Take On Me

Unlock all skills in General Skill tree

–

Toxic Garbage Island

Unlock all skills in Tools skill tree

–

Wash It All Away

Unlock all skills in Pressure Washer skill tree

–

Rain Formerly Known As Purple

Unlock all skills in Water skill tree

–

Things Left Behind

Complete Things Left Behind mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Things Left Behind mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Routines In The Night

Complete Things Left Behind mission

–

Everybody Wants To Rule The World

Complete the Amber Alert mission

–

Amber Alert

Complete Amber Alert mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Amber Alert mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Machine Love

Complete the Secluded Retreat mission

–

Secluded Retreat

Complete Secluded Retreat mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Secluded Retreat mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Losing My Religion

Complete the Circle of Friends mission

–

Circle Of Friends

Complete Circle of Friends mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Circle of Friends mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Demon Cleaner

Complete the Town Too Small mission

–

Town Too Small

Complete Town Too Small mission with perfect score

Achieve a perfect score in the Town Too Small mission by cleaning all the bloodstains, picking up all the evidence, getting rid of the trash, and all the bodies.

Sweet Dreams

Complete all nightmares missions

–

Hold On To The Vision

Complete your first True Cleaner Challenge

–

Lookin' Out My Back Door

Find Zack's secret room

Find the secret hidden room during the mission Call in Dead. From the control room, use the step stool to jump onto the lockers and reach the pipes. Follow the pipes to get to a vent, break it open, and drop to the hidden room.

Electric Feel

Throw the toaster into the bathtub

In your apartment, pick up the toaster from the kitchen and throw it in the bathtub.

Juke Box Hero

Find all music cassettes

–

All Night Radio

Find all music discs

–

We Are the Sound

Collect all CD-DVDs

–

Sharp Dressed Man

Equip a skin for every one of your tools

–

Call Me Maybe

Don't respond to Big Jim's call

Don't answer the walkie-talkie at the start of the mission Trial by Blood.

Down by the River

Remember to flush!

Flush the toilet once each mission.

The Communiti levels don't have any achievements, so these are all the achievements that are available in Crime Scene Cleaner . Hopefully, this guide will make it easier for you to track everything down.

item.title: God of War Laufey Cast Revealed
item.description:
God of War Laufey is the next main series God of War game, and we now know who will be playing who in the highly-anticipated release. God of War Laufey was the last big reveal of the latest PlayStation State of Play event, with Sony showing off about 20 minutes of gameplay. The God of War Laufey gameplay presentation looked fantastic, but the game did not got a release window announcement at the show.

God of War Laufey 's gameplay showcase laid the groundwork for the story, with Faye/Laufey waking up in a strange land after her apparent death and funeral to fight dead gods in the afterlife. Faye isn't alone in her adventure, and will be joined by various supporting characters on her journey. Most other story details are being kept secret for now, but we do know who is playing the various characters in God of War Laufey .

God of War Laufey Cast List (So Far)

  • Laufey/Faye - Deborah Ann Woll
  • Phranque - Jack Quaid
  • Rue - Perlina Lau

The titular Laufey/Faye is played by Deborah Ann Woll, reprising the role from previous God of War games. Woll is perhaps best known for her time in the Marvel Cinematic Universe as Karen Page, appearing in the original Netflix Daredevil series, various Punisher projects, The Defenders , and the acclaimed reboot Daredevil: Born Again . Her two primary companions in the game are a magic ribbon named Rue and a cosmic cube named Phranque, played by Perlina Lau and Jack Quaid, respectively.

Perlina Lau is a producer and actress who has appeared in TV series like Friday Night Bites and Creamerie . Jack Quaid, meanwhile, is best known for his role as Hughie in The Boys , which just recently aired its series finale. Quaid's first major film role was in The Hunger Games , and in the last five years he's appeared in Scream (2022) , Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse , Oppenheimer , Companion , and Novocaine , among other projects.

Who’s That Character?

Identify the silhouettes before time runs out.

5.0 s
0 / 10

Results

0

High Score: 0

—

More Games
Who’s That Character? Identify the silhouettes before time runs out.
Easy (7.5s)Medium (5.0s)Hard (2.5s)Permadeath (2.5s)
5.0 s
0 / 10
Results
0
High Score: 0 —
More Games

God of War Laufey will have a variety of villains for Faye and her companions to contend with, with gods Sekhmet and Begtse specifically highlighted in the gameplay presentation. Unfortunately, it wasn't revealed who will be playing those characters in the game, so fans will have to wait for more information on that front. There will likely be other villains featured in God of War Laufey as well, so there is still plenty more to learn about the game.

Subscribe for deeper God of War Laufey coverage

Craving deeper context on God of War Laufey's cast and characters? Subscribe to our newsletter for in-depth casting breakdowns, character analysis and extended coverage of major game reveals - more context for dedicated fans.
By subscribing, you agree to receive newsletter and marketing emails, and accept our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. You can unsubscribe anytime.

Kratos and Atreus were both spotted in the God of War Laufey gameplay presentation, and they will presumably be played by Christopher Judge and Sunny Suljic again, though it's unclear if their appearances will strictly use old material or feature new recordings. A lot is being kept underwraps when it comes to God of War Laufey , and so fans will have to wait for more info. A specific release window wasn't announced, but it's believe God of War Laufey will be released within the next couple of years.

God of War Laufey

Follow
Followed
Action
Adventure
Hack and Slash
RPG
Systems
Developer(s)
Santa Monica Studio
Publisher(s)
Sony Interactive Entertainment
Prequel(s)
God of War, God of War Ragnarok
Franchise
God of War
Number of Players
Single-player
9 Images

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

Genre(s)
Action, Adventure, Hack and Slash, RPG
Powered by
item.content:encoded:
God of War Laufey is the next main series God of War game, and we now know who will be playing who in the highly-anticipated release. God of War Laufey was the last big reveal of the latest PlayStation State of Play event, with Sony showing off about 20 minutes of gameplay. The God of War Laufey gameplay presentation looked fantastic, but the game did not got a release window announcement at the show.

God of War Laufey 's gameplay showcase laid the groundwork for the story, with Faye/Laufey waking up in a strange land after her apparent death and funeral to fight dead gods in the afterlife. Faye isn't alone in her adventure, and will be joined by various supporting characters on her journey. Most other story details are being kept secret for now, but we do know who is playing the various characters in God of War Laufey .

God of War Laufey Cast List (So Far)

  • Laufey/Faye - Deborah Ann Woll
  • Phranque - Jack Quaid
  • Rue - Perlina Lau

The titular Laufey/Faye is played by Deborah Ann Woll, reprising the role from previous God of War games. Woll is perhaps best known for her time in the Marvel Cinematic Universe as Karen Page, appearing in the original Netflix Daredevil series, various Punisher projects, The Defenders , and the acclaimed reboot Daredevil: Born Again . Her two primary companions in the game are a magic ribbon named Rue and a cosmic cube named Phranque, played by Perlina Lau and Jack Quaid, respectively.

Perlina Lau is a producer and actress who has appeared in TV series like Friday Night Bites and Creamerie . Jack Quaid, meanwhile, is best known for his role as Hughie in The Boys , which just recently aired its series finale. Quaid's first major film role was in The Hunger Games , and in the last five years he's appeared in Scream (2022) , Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse , Oppenheimer , Companion , and Novocaine , among other projects.

Who’s That Character?

Identify the silhouettes before time runs out.

5.0 s
0 / 10

Results

0

High Score: 0

—

More Games
Who’s That Character? Identify the silhouettes before time runs out.
Easy (7.5s)Medium (5.0s)Hard (2.5s)Permadeath (2.5s)
5.0 s
0 / 10
Results
0
High Score: 0 —
More Games

God of War Laufey will have a variety of villains for Faye and her companions to contend with, with gods Sekhmet and Begtse specifically highlighted in the gameplay presentation. Unfortunately, it wasn't revealed who will be playing those characters in the game, so fans will have to wait for more information on that front. There will likely be other villains featured in God of War Laufey as well, so there is still plenty more to learn about the game.

Subscribe for deeper God of War Laufey coverage

Craving deeper context on God of War Laufey's cast and characters? Subscribe to our newsletter for in-depth casting breakdowns, character analysis and extended coverage of major game reveals - more context for dedicated fans.
By subscribing, you agree to receive newsletter and marketing emails, and accept our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. You can unsubscribe anytime.

Kratos and Atreus were both spotted in the God of War Laufey gameplay presentation, and they will presumably be played by Christopher Judge and Sunny Suljic again, though it's unclear if their appearances will strictly use old material or feature new recordings. A lot is being kept underwraps when it comes to God of War Laufey , and so fans will have to wait for more info. A specific release window wasn't announced, but it's believe God of War Laufey will be released within the next couple of years.

God of War Laufey

WHERE TO PLAY

item.title: Alter Ego Secrets & CDs In Crime Scene Cleaner
item.description:
Before trying to complete the Alter Ego level in Crime Scene Cleaner , you need to collect all the missing fuses as they will unlock the final door in the Lounge. Additionally, the fuses activate stations that make it possible to find all CDs and discover all secrets during the Communiti Laboratory in Crime Scene Cleaner .

All Secrets & CDs In Alter Ego (Crime Scene Cleaner)

There are two secrets and three CDs to collect while completing Alter Ego level in Crime Scene Cleaner :

  • CD 1 is found in the Office.
  • CD 2 is in Testing Zone B: Behaviour.
  • CD 3 and Secret 1 are in the Prison Block.
  • Secret 2 is in the Laboratory.

However, before attempting to collect anything, you need to find all the fuses and put them back as they activate stations that'll help you with the CDs and secrets.

All Fuses Location In Communiti Laboratory (Crime Scene Cleaner)

Water Fuse Location

From the cave's entrance, climb the ladder to go through a corridor. Inside the Old Office, turn left and climb the stairs.

Approach the table and pick up the green book, which is actually a key.

Go back down and open the bookcase using the key to reach the elevator.

Head to the second floor and go through the two double doors to arrive at the Laboratory.

Walk towards the fuse boxes to find the water fuse there. Plug it in to activate the nearby water source.

Lift Fuse Location

The second fuse is inside Testing Zone A: Endurance, but there are a couple of steps you need to do first. Walk around the lab to the back to find a lift. Take it up to reach the Lounge.

Take the device from the case and go back down.

Next, turn to the left side of the lab and enter the Testing Zone A: Endurance.

Enter the room with the electric chair and place the device in its place. Don't forget to remove the body from the chair.

Grab the fuse locked inside a metal box and throw it over the metal detector. If you walk normally, the detector will force close the door, stopping you from proceeding.

Put the box on the electric chair and head out to pull the lever. The electricity will force open the box and you can take the fuse.

Place it inside its box to activate the lift.

This lift only moves up and down and players will use it to reach a secret area later on.

Cryo Chamber Fuse Location

Head to the Lounge and take the stairs to the left, arriving at the Prison Block.

The third fuse is inside the first cell, but the door is closed. Go to the cell next to it and remove the cardboard blocking the way.

Next, destroy the box and the painting to go through a hole in the wall.

Take the fuse and drop it through the vent to land in the Laboratory. Go down using the makeshift ladder and place the Cryo Chamber fuse in its place.

Now, you can open the chamber pods behind you to get the remaining bodies out.

Chute Fuse Location

Return to the Prison Block and walk towards the end to enter the control room.

Grab the final fuse and jump down to reach the lab.

Put the fuse in its box to activate the chute on the right side of the lab.

CD 1: The Office

Now that all the fuses are found, the mysterious door in the Lounge can be unlocked.

Head up using the lift and open the double door with the sponge on it to find the Office. Grab the CD under the shelf behind the desk.

CD 2: Hidden Room In Testing Zone B: Behaviour

Across the lift in the Lounge is a big room called Testing Zone B: Behaviour that'll trap you inside until you're done cleaning. Proceed inside until you reach some shelves with a painting. Break it to reveal a way out. Grab the second CD before leaving.

Secret 1: Hidden Room In Prison Block

Go to the Prison Block and enter the control room where the lift lever is found. Switch it up and quickly run to the lift.

As it's going up, you can see a secret gap in the wall. Jump to it or use a ladder to reach it and go inside to find the first secret.

CD 3: Prison Block's Hidden Room

Crouch through the objects to go to the other side and grab a CD.

Secret 2: Hidden Room In The Laboratory

Head back to the Laboratory and get the dead battery near the Lounge lift. Go to the Testing Zone A: Endurance and throw the battery over the metal detector. Place it on the chair then pull the lever outside to charge it. Put the battery in its place and press the button next to it to go down and discover the second secret. Open the safe to find a lot of cash.

Crime Scene Cleaner

Follow
Followed
Simulation
Crime
Systems
OpenCritic Reviews
Critics Rec: 29%
Released
August 14, 2024
ESRB
Mature 17+ / Blood and Gore, Drug Reference, Strong Language, Violence
Developer(s)
President Studio
Publisher(s)
President Studio, PlayWay S.A.
10 Images

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL

Genre(s)
Simulation, Crime
Powered by
item.content:encoded:
Before trying to complete the Alter Ego level in Crime Scene Cleaner , you need to collect all the missing fuses as they will unlock the final door in the Lounge. Additionally, the fuses activate stations that make it possible to find all CDs and discover all secrets during the Communiti Laboratory in Crime Scene Cleaner .

All Secrets & CDs In Alter Ego (Crime Scene Cleaner)

There are two secrets and three CDs to collect while completing Alter Ego level in Crime Scene Cleaner :

  • CD 1 is found in the Office.
  • CD 2 is in Testing Zone B: Behaviour.
  • CD 3 and Secret 1 are in the Prison Block.
  • Secret 2 is in the Laboratory.

However, before attempting to collect anything, you need to find all the fuses and put them back as they activate stations that'll help you with the CDs and secrets.

All Fuses Location In Communiti Laboratory (Crime Scene Cleaner)

Water Fuse Location

From the cave's entrance, climb the ladder to go through a corridor. Inside the Old Office, turn left and climb the stairs.

Approach the table and pick up the green book, which is actually a key.

Go back down and open the bookcase using the key to reach the elevator.

Head to the second floor and go through the two double doors to arrive at the Laboratory.

Walk towards the fuse boxes to find the water fuse there. Plug it in to activate the nearby water source.

Lift Fuse Location

The second fuse is inside Testing Zone A: Endurance, but there are a couple of steps you need to do first. Walk around the lab to the back to find a lift. Take it up to reach the Lounge.

Take the device from the case and go back down.

Next, turn to the left side of the lab and enter the Testing Zone A: Endurance.

Enter the room with the electric chair and place the device in its place. Don't forget to remove the body from the chair.

Grab the fuse locked inside a metal box and throw it over the metal detector. If you walk normally, the detector will force close the door, stopping you from proceeding.

Put the box on the electric chair and head out to pull the lever. The electricity will force open the box and you can take the fuse.

Place it inside its box to activate the lift.

This lift only moves up and down and players will use it to reach a secret area later on.

Cryo Chamber Fuse Location

Head to the Lounge and take the stairs to the left, arriving at the Prison Block.

The third fuse is inside the first cell, but the door is closed. Go to the cell next to it and remove the cardboard blocking the way.

Next, destroy the box and the painting to go through a hole in the wall.

Take the fuse and drop it through the vent to land in the Laboratory. Go down using the makeshift ladder and place the Cryo Chamber fuse in its place.

Now, you can open the chamber pods behind you to get the remaining bodies out.

Chute Fuse Location

Return to the Prison Block and walk towards the end to enter the control room.

Grab the final fuse and jump down to reach the lab.

Put the fuse in its box to activate the chute on the right side of the lab.

CD 1: The Office

Now that all the fuses are found, the mysterious door in the Lounge can be unlocked.

Head up using the lift and open the double door with the sponge on it to find the Office. Grab the CD under the shelf behind the desk.

CD 2: Hidden Room In Testing Zone B: Behaviour

Across the lift in the Lounge is a big room called Testing Zone B: Behaviour that'll trap you inside until you're done cleaning. Proceed inside until you reach some shelves with a painting. Break it to reveal a way out. Grab the second CD before leaving.

Secret 1: Hidden Room In Prison Block

Go to the Prison Block and enter the control room where the lift lever is found. Switch it up and quickly run to the lift.

As it's going up, you can see a secret gap in the wall. Jump to it or use a ladder to reach it and go inside to find the first secret.

CD 3: Prison Block's Hidden Room

Crouch through the objects to go to the other side and grab a CD.

Secret 2: Hidden Room In The Laboratory

Head back to the Laboratory and get the dead battery near the Lounge lift. Go to the Testing Zone A: Endurance and throw the battery over the metal detector. Place it on the chair then pull the lever outside to charge it. Put the battery in its place and press the button next to it to go down and discover the second secret. Open the safe to find a lot of cash.

Crime Scene Cleaner

Powered by

item.title: The Best Rayman Game is Officially Making a Comeback
item.description:
Ubisoft has confirmed that it's remaking arguably the best game in the Rayman franchise, and it will release later this year. During the recent PlayStation State of Play, Ubisoft gave fans the first look at Rayman Legends Retold , including gameplay that showcased the game's updated visuals and performance. Although the classic Ubisoft platformer series has been dormant for some time, Rayman is finally back with Rayman Legends Retold .

Rayman is already having a big 2026, with Rayman 30th Anniversary Edition launching back in February. Aside from this re-release of the original game, Rayman Legends Retold brings the limbless hero back for an enhanced adventure on modern hardware. Although Rayman himself has been sidelined in favor of his spin-off counterpart, the Rabbids, in recent years, things are about to change as fans will once again get to experience one of the greatest platformers of all time when Rayman Legends Retold launches.

Rayman Legends Retold Remakes the Hit 2013 Platformer

Fans got their first glimpse of Rayman Legends Retold during the June 2 State of Play. During this showcase, Rayman Legends Retold showed the legendary platforming gameplay that made the original release so beloved, now looking cleaner than ever before thanks to current-gen hardware. Additionally, Rayman Legends Retold is confirmed to feature new content, including new story twists, a brand-new realm, and an expanded soundtrack. The game is set to launch on all major platforms on October 1.

Who’s That Character?

Identify the silhouettes before time runs out.

5.0 s
0 / 10

Results

0

High Score: 0

—

More Games
Who’s That Character? Identify the silhouettes before time runs out.
Easy (7.5s)Medium (5.0s)Hard (2.5s)Permadeath (2.5s)
5.0 s
0 / 10
Results
0
High Score: 0 —
More Games

Originally released back in 2013, Rayman Legends is a 2D platformer that features co-op for up to four players. Aside from Rayman, playable characters include Globox, Grand Minimus, and Barbara, along with dozens of unlockable alt costumes for these characters. The original also included over 120 playable levels, including several originally from Rayman Origins , which will once again be remastered in Rayman Legends Retold .

Other confirmed features for Rayman Legends Retold include:

  • Stunning 3D visuals
  • A brand-new story
  • Fully voiced cinematics
  • A never-before-seen sixth realm
  • Four all-new musical stages
  • Thrilling dragon rides
  • New Cave of Trials challenges
  • Return of Kung Foot with improved controls and customizable rules
  • An expanded soundtrack from acclaimed composers Christophe Heral and Grant Kirkhope
  • New and improved gameplay

Rayman Legends Retold looks to be the perfect package for both returning fans and brand-new players. For returning fans, new story sections and dialogue between the Rayman Legends Retold cast are an enticing offering. But even fans who have played the original multiple times will want to check out Retold for its brand-new sixth realm, four new musical stages, and new Cave of Trials challenges.

Rearrange the covers into the correct US release order.

Your Order

Results

—

—

—

More Games
Rearrange the covers into the correct US release order.
Easy (5)Medium (7)Hard (10)

Your Order

Results

—
— —
More Games

Rayman Legends Retold might not be the only Rayman game Ubisoft has cooking at the moment. A recent leak from the Xbox Store suggests that Rayman Origins: Enhanced Edition is also coming soon, giving players a way to experience the 2011 game in a new way. Although there is no sign of a brand-new Rayman game on the horizon, fans can at least rest easy knowing that Ubisoft hasn't abandoned the franchise completely while enjoying the modernized takes on some of the Rayman series' greatest hits.

9 /10

Rayman Legends

Follow
Followed
Platformer
Systems
OpenCritic Reviews
Top Critic Avg: 90 /100 Critics Rec: 95%
Released
August 30, 2013
ESRB
E10+ For Everyone 10+ due to Cartoon Violence, Comic Mischief
Developer(s)
Ubisoft Montpellier
Publisher(s)
Ubisoft, Nintendo

WHERE TO PLAY

SUBSCRIPTION
DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Genre(s)
Platformer
Powered by
item.content:encoded:
Ubisoft has confirmed that it's remaking arguably the best game in the Rayman franchise, and it will release later this year. During the recent PlayStation State of Play, Ubisoft gave fans the first look at Rayman Legends Retold , including gameplay that showcased the game's updated visuals and performance. Although the classic Ubisoft platformer series has been dormant for some time, Rayman is finally back with Rayman Legends Retold .

Rayman is already having a big 2026, with Rayman 30th Anniversary Edition launching back in February. Aside from this re-release of the original game, Rayman Legends Retold brings the limbless hero back for an enhanced adventure on modern hardware. Although Rayman himself has been sidelined in favor of his spin-off counterpart, the Rabbids, in recent years, things are about to change as fans will once again get to experience one of the greatest platformers of all time when Rayman Legends Retold launches.

Rayman Legends Retold Remakes the Hit 2013 Platformer

Fans got their first glimpse of Rayman Legends Retold during the June 2 State of Play. During this showcase, Rayman Legends Retold showed the legendary platforming gameplay that made the original release so beloved, now looking cleaner than ever before thanks to current-gen hardware. Additionally, Rayman Legends Retold is confirmed to feature new content, including new story twists, a brand-new realm, and an expanded soundtrack. The game is set to launch on all major platforms on October 1.

Who’s That Character?

Originally released back in 2013, Rayman Legends is a 2D platformer that features co-op for up to four players. Aside from Rayman, playable characters include Globox, Grand Minimus, and Barbara, along with dozens of unlockable alt costumes for these characters. The original also included over 120 playable levels, including several originally from Rayman Origins , which will once again be remastered in Rayman Legends Retold .

Other confirmed features for Rayman Legends Retold include:

  • Stunning 3D visuals
  • A brand-new story
  • Fully voiced cinematics
  • A never-before-seen sixth realm
  • Four all-new musical stages
  • Thrilling dragon rides
  • New Cave of Trials challenges
  • Return of Kung Foot with improved controls and customizable rules
  • An expanded soundtrack from acclaimed composers Christophe Heral and Grant Kirkhope
  • New and improved gameplay

Rayman Legends Retold looks to be the perfect package for both returning fans and brand-new players. For returning fans, new story sections and dialogue between the Rayman Legends Retold cast are an enticing offering. But even fans who have played the original multiple times will want to check out Retold for its brand-new sixth realm, four new musical stages, and new Cave of Trials challenges.

Although there is no sign of a brand-new Rayman game on the horizon, fans can at least rest easy knowing that Ubisoft hasn't abandoned the franchise completely while enjoying the modernized takes on some of the Rayman series' greatest hits.
